COURT TRIAL ON APR-16-2003 IN DEPT. 503 - COURT TRIAL COMPLETED. COURT RENDERED HIS TENTATIVE STATEMENT OF DECISION: COURT FOUND IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ON THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF PROMISSORY NOTE THE SUM OF $30,000.00 PLUS INTEREST OF 7.5% DUE AND OWING TO PLAINTIFF. ON THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION ON CONSPIRACY AND FRAUD AND 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUDULENT TRANSFER, COURT FOUND FOR THE DEFENDANT AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF. THE TENTATIVE DECISION SHALL BE THE PROPOSED FINAL DECISION UNLESS WITHIN 20 DAYS FROM THIS DATE THAT COUNSEL SHALL MAKE ANY OBJECTIONS TO THIS TENTATIVE STATEMENT OF DECISION. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: C. LI; REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193 (503)
